content: So che Tom è una persona di cui possiamo fidarci.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I know Tom is a person that we can trust
eng:I know Tom is a person we can trust
eng:I know that Tom is a person that we can trust
eng:I know that Tom is a person we can trust
